case_title: ALICE LEE VS. FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,228.40 FILED BY LEE, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC. PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR DOMESTIC CORPORATION IS "DENIED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-15-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, TO SERVE THE CO-DEFENDANT PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP. DEPT. 506, JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(AGENT FOR SERVICE: DAVID JORDAN)* SERVED MAY-09-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP
RETURNED CERTIFIED MAIL - UNSERVED: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT (SMALL CLAIMS)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-15-2011 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, ALICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC. $2,228.40 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,298.40, CLAIM AGAINST PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $38.43 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC. PRIORITY FINANCIAL GROUP
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC.
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $71.43 ACCRUED INTEREST, $60.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED (DOCUMENTATION OF UNSATISFIED WRIT RECEIVED FROM SHERIFF'S DEPT WITHOUT ORIGINAL WRITT) AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM LAW CENTER INC.
